TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Masalipa:Infobox television O Aidelifangti(Holam: 愛的立方體, ira ko Lifangti no Olah, Ikilis: The Cube) cecay tilifi dorama i Taywan. Misanga' Pipahosoan to tilifi no Yen-cu-min ci ina to tilifi dorama. Mipasadak to 2022 a miheca saka 4 a folad saka 17 a romi'ad 9:00~10:30 dadaya. Mianingaya a patingso^ Huge :Afalian Lufic Lahok: Fu Sien-haw Sewwen : Sewyi : Yang Cen Twan Cun-haw Unsan : Low Mey-ling Sye Yi-hung
S.PHON: masaɾipa:info~ub~b~vo~ux təɾəb~visio~un o~u aiɬ~ɮəɾifaŋti(ħo~uɾam: *****, ira ko~u ɾifaŋti no~u o~uɾaħ, ikiɾis: tħə ʦo~u~ub~b~və) ʦəʦaj tiɾifi ɬ~ɮo~urama i tajwan. misaŋaʡ pipaħo~uso~uan to~u tiɾifi no~u jən-ʦo~u~u-min ʦi ina to~u tiɾifi ɬ~ɮo~urama. mipasaɬ~ɮak to~u **** a miħəʦa saka * a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ *:**~**:** ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja. mianiŋaja a patiŋso~uʔ ħo~u~u*ə :afaɾian ɾo~u~ufiʦ ɾaħo~uk: fo~u~u siən-ħaw səwwən : səwji : jaŋ ʦən twan ʦo~u~un-ħaw o~u~unsan : ɾo~uw məj-ɾiŋ sjə ji-ħo~u~uŋ
S.FORM: Masalipa:Infobox television O Aidelifangti(Holam: 愛的立方體, ira ko Lifangti no Olah, Ikilis: The Cube) cecay tilifi dorama i Taywan. Misanga' Pipahosoan to tilifi no Yen-cu-min ci ina to tilifi dorama. Mipasadak to 2022 a miheca saka 4 a folad saka 17 a romi'ad 9:00~10:30 dadaya. Mianingaya a patingso^ Huge :Afalian Lufic Lahok: Fu Sien-haw Sewwen : Sewyi : Yang Cen Twan Cun-haw Unsan : Low Mey-ling Sye Yi-hung
